items.title: Pick up EGO’s popular 56V 16-inch cordless electric chain saw with a 2.5Ah battery down at $219 (Reg. $279)
items.summary:
Amazon is offering folks another chance to score the popular EGO Power+ 56V 16-inch Cordless Electric Chain Saw with a 2.5Ah battery at $219 shipped. Dropping down from $279 here, we’ve been seeing this same discounted rate appear consistently for quite some time, beaten out over the last 12 months by a Prime-exclusive deal to $208 back during October’s 2025 Prime Day event. The deal here gives you a $60 price cut from the tag, landing it at the second-best price we have tracked over the last year. You can find a large number of EGO’s other tools benefiting from discounts in the brand’s official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Get more power for your EGO tool arsenal while the 56V 2.5Ah battery is down at a new $99 low, more
items.summary:
Update 5/4: We just spotted this EGO 56V 2.5Ah Battery dropping to a new $99 low right now!

Over at Amazon, EGO Power+ fans can now score the 56V 2.5Ah Battery down at $129 shipped, with several other 4.0Ah to 12.0Ah batteries also available on the same landing page. Normally $199 at full price, we’ve been seeing it keep down around $160 since late February, though there were some more recent falls to $149 and $139 before today’s deal. Now, you can score an even bigger 35% markdown off the full price, saving you $70 and landing it at the best price we have tracked since June 2025. You can also shop the brand’s many Power+ tool savings over in its official Amazon storefront here, or by heading to our dedicated tool hub.

What we love

Soldering is one of those skills that can come in handy when tech needs to be repaired. So if you’ve always wanted to learn, this kit from Fanttik is worth a look. It’s battery operated, and can be replenished via USB-C, which at this point is true for just about every tool Fanttik makes.
